meta.title: mybetrecord — Sports Betting Tracker, ROI & Kelly Stake Ledger
meta.description: Tsatani kubetcherana kulikonse m'buku limodzi lokhazikika. ROI, zokolola, mitengo ya Kelly, CLV, ma curve a equity, ndi zotumiza kunja - zopangidwira anthu omwe amabetchera manambala.
meta.pricingDescription: Buku laulere la kubetcha pamasewera lomwe lili ndi zonse, kapena Pro yodula mitengo yopanda malire tsiku lililonse pafupifupi $5 USD pamwezi mundalama zakwanu.

home.heroTitle: Tracker kubetcha pamasewera kwa anthu omwe amabetchera manambala
home.heroLead: Lekani kunyengerera maspredishiti. Lowetsani kubetcha kulikonse, tsatirani ROI ndi zokolola, kukula kwake ndi Kelly, ndikuwona komwe malire anu amakhala.
home.section1Title: Kuyambira chipwirikiti cha spreadsheet kupita ku leja yolangizidwa
home.section1Sub: Obetcha ambiri amakulitsa mapulogalamu ndi ma tabu a Excel. mybetrecord imakupatsani malo amodzi ojambulira kubetcha, kukhazikika, ndikuwerenga manambala ochita moona mtima.
home.featureOddsDesc: Mawonekedwe a Decimal, American, fractional, ndi Asian - amasinthidwa kuti azikhala osasinthasintha.
home.featureKellyDesc: Khazikitsani bankroll ndi zolowetsa m'mphepete; pezani makulidwe amtengo wovomerezeka kutengera muyeso wa Kelly.
home.featureRoiDesc: Kumenyeka, kuchulukirachulukira, phindu pamwezi, komanso kuchuluka kwa mabetcha okhazikika.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: Gawani magwiridwe antchito ndi masewera, mtundu wa kubetcha, tipster, kapena bookmaker kuti mupeze komwe mumapambana ndikudontha.
home.featureClvDesc: Lembani zotsekera ndikuyesa CLV - chizindikiro chakuthwa kuposa zotsatira zazifupi zokha.
home.featureExportDesc: Tsitsani CSV, Excel, kapena JSON. Pangani makiyi a API a zolembera ndi zongopanga zokha.
home.pricingSub: Chilichonse chomwe chili pansipa chikuphatikizidwa pamapulani onse awiri. Pro imachotsa mtengo watsiku ndi tsiku - pafupifupi $5 USD pamwezi mundalama zakomweko.
home.pricingFreeLimit: Mpaka kubetcha 5 ndi ma multis 5 patsiku
home.pricingProLimit: Mabetcha opanda malire ndi ma multis tsiku lililonse
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Leja yokwanira yobetcha - zochitika, zosankha, mtengo, zotsatira & P/L
home.pricingFeatureOdds: Mitundu yonse yazovuta - decimal, American, fractional & Asian
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Kubetcha kulikonse - kupambana, njira iliyonse, mocheperapo, ma multis & handicap
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Kelly amawerengera kuchuluka kwa banki yanu & m'mphepete mwake
home.pricingFeatureReports: ROI, zokolola, kugunda kwamtundu & cumulative equity curve
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Zowonongeka ndi masewera, mtundu wa kubetcha, tipster & bookmaker
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Zolinga zachitsanzo ndi zaumwini ndi m'mphepete mwa unit
home.pricingFeatureSettlement: Kuchotsera ndalama ndi kuchotsera kwa opambana
home.pricingFeatureApi: Makiyi a API a zolemba & automation
home.pricingFeatureLocale: Mawonekedwe azilankhulo zambiri & chithandizo chanthawi yanthawi
home.pricingNote: Pro ndi pafupifupi $5 USD pamwezi, zomwe zimawonetsedwa mundalama zakomweko. Letsani nthawi iliyonse pa Zokonda.
home.section2Sub: Phunzirani masamu kuseri kwa ma metrics - kenako tsatirani m'mabuku anu.
home.blogRoiDesc: Nambala ziwiri zamutu, nthawi zambiri zimasokonezeka. Dziwani kuti ndi iti yomwe imayankha funso liti.
home.blogKellyDesc: Momwe kuchuluka kwa magawo kumagwirira ntchito - komanso chifukwa chomwe obetcha ambiri amagwiritsa ntchito kachigawo kakang'ono ka Kelly wathunthu.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: Pamene Excel ikukwanira - komanso pamene leja yodzipatulira imasunga maola ndi zolakwika.
home.faqTrackerQ: Kodi tracker ya kubetcha pamasewera ndi chiyani?
home.faqTrackerA: Buku losanjikiza la wager iliyonse - ma stakes, odd, zotsatira, ndi phindu - yokhala ndi ROI yodziwikiratu, zokolola, ndi kuwonongeka m'malo mwa mafomula pamanja.
home.faqOddsA: Decimal, American, fractional, Hong Kong, Malaysian, and Indonesian. Ma bets onse amasungidwa ndi canonical decimal odd kuti afotokozere.
home.faqKellyQ: Kodi Kelly akugwira ntchito bwanji pano?
home.faqKellyA: Lowetsani mwayi wanu pa kubetcha. Ndi bankroll ndi Kelly multiplier akhazikitsidwa, pulogalamuyi imalimbikitsa mtengo kutengera m'mphepete mwanu.
home.faqExportQ: Kodi ndingathe kutumiza kapena kugwiritsa ntchito API?
home.faqExportA: Inde - CSV, Excel, ndi JSON zimatumiza kunja kuphatikiza makiyi a API kuti mupeze zolemba zanu mwadongosolo.
home.faqTipsterQ: Kodi iyi ndi ntchito ya tipster?
home.faqTipsterA: Ayi. mybetrecord ndikusunga zolemba komanso kusanthula kokha. Sitigulitsa zosankha kapena kulonjeza phindu.
home.rg: Kutchova njuga koyenera. Kubetcha kuyenera kukhala zosangalatsa, osati ndalama. Osayika chilichonse kuposa momwe mungathere kuti mutaya. Ngati kutchova njuga kukusokoneza moyo wanu, funani thandizo kuchokera kumabungwe monga BeGambleAware kapena Kutchova njuga. mybetrecord simathandizira kubetcha - imakuthandizani kumvetsetsa mbiri yanu.
home.ctaLead: Pangani akaunti yaulere ndikulowetsa kubetcha kwanu koyamba pasanathe mphindi imodzi.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Analytics ndi kusunga mbiri - osati upangiri wa njuga.

meta.title: Blog - mybetrecord
meta.description: Maupangiri pamaleja obetcha, ROI, muyeso wa Kelly, mtengo wa mzere wotseka, ndi kawerengedwe kakubetcha pamasewera.

blog.indexSub: Phunzirani masamu kuseri kwa ma metrics - kenako tsatirani m'mabuku anu.
blog.ctaLead: Kubetcha kwa logi, onani ROI ndi zokolola, ndi kukula kwake ndi Kelly - akaunti yaulere.
blog.rg: Kutchova njuga mwadala. Zophunzitsa zokha — osati upangiri wa kubetcha. Osayika chilichonse kuposa momwe mungathere kuti mutaya.

spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.title: Spreadsheet vs Dedicated Betting Tracker
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.description: Pamene Excel ikukwanira mbiri yanu yobetcha - komanso pamene tracker yodzipatulira imapulumutsa nthawi, zolakwika, ndi malo osawona.
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.body:
Maspredishiti ndiye poyambira ponseponse pazambiri zobetcha. Ndi zaulere, zosinthika, komanso zodziwika bwino. Obetcha ambiri samawasiya. Zina zimagunda khoma - nthawi zambiri zovuta zikakula kuposa ma cell ndi ma formula.

Maspredishiti akamagwira ntchito

  • Kubetcherana kosakwana ~50 pamwezi
  • Masewera amodzi, ndalama imodzi, mwayi wocheperako
  • Zotsatira zosavuta zopambana/zotayika, palibe njira iliyonse kapena kusinthanitsa
  • Mumakonda kusunga mafomu

Kumene masamba amasweka

Vuto Kupweteka kwa spreadsheet Phindu la Tracker Mawonekedwe Odds Mizati yosinthira pamanja Automatic normalization Njira iliyonse / EW Mafomu ogawaniza omwe amakhala ndi vuto Kukhazikika kokhazikika Kelly sizing Manganinso bankroll ikasintha Malangizo amoyo pa kubetcha CLV Zigawo zowonjezera, zosavuta kudumpha Munda pa kubetcha kulikonse Zowonongeka Kukonza tebulo la Pivot Kudina kamodzi ndi sport/tipster API / automation Zolemba zosalimba Makiyi a API amtundu woyamba Zolemba zam'manja Clunky Pulogalamu yomvera pa intaneti

Mtengo wobisika: nthawi

Mphindi khumi pa sabata kukonza mafomula ndi zolakwika za copy-paste zimaposa mtengo wa chida chodzipereka kwa aliyense amene akubetcha kwambiri. Mtengo wokulirapo ndizosankha zoipa kuchokera ku data yoyipa - zopanda pake zomwe zatayika, ntchito yoiwalika.

Njira yosamuka

  1. Tumizani kunja chilichonse chomwe muli nacho (CSV ili bwino)
  2. Lowetsani kapena sinthaninso kubetcha kwanyengo yaposachedwa
  3. Kuthamanga kofanana kwa milungu iwiri - ziwerengero ziyenera kufanana
  4. Chotsani tsambalo ngati malipoti avomereza

Zomwe tracker sayenera kuchita

Sichiyenera kugulitsa mapikidwe, kulonjeza ROI, kapena kubweza chilango cha banki. mybetrecord ndi analytics ndi kusunga zolemba - spreadsheet simungaswe mwangozi.

Yesani zonse moona mtima

Sungani pepala lanu mwezi winanso koma lowetsani kubetcha kwatsopano mu mybetrecord. Fananizani phindu la kumapeto kwa mwezi ndi zokolola. Ngati zikugwirizana ndipo tracker yasunga nthawi, sinthani.

Yambani kwaulere: Pangani akaunti — palibe khadi lomwe likufunika kuti muyambe kudula mitengo.

betting-equity-curve.title: Kuwerenga Kubetcha Kwanu kwa Curve
betting-equity-curve.description: Equity curve imapanga phindu lowonjezereka pakapita nthawi. Phunzirani zomwe mawonekedwe amatanthauza, chifukwa chiyani mabetcha omwe akudikirira sakuphatikizidwa, komanso momwe mungawonere kugwedezeka.
betting-equity-curve.body:
A mzere wokhotakhota ndi tchati cha kuchuluka kwa phindu (kapena bankroll) pakatha kubetcha kulikonse, motsatira nthawi. Imasintha tebulo lazotsatira kukhala nkhani yomwe mungathe kuiwerenga pang'onopang'ono.

Kupendekera kowoneka bwino kumawonekera

Mphepete yabwino yokhala ndi staking yomveka imatulutsa kutsetsereka m'mwamba ndi zotsika - osati mzere wowongoka. Kutalika kwa nthawi yayitali kapena kutsika kumakhala kosiyana; kutengeka kosalekeza motsutsana nanu kungasonyeze kuwonongeka kwachitsanzo kapena kutsetsereka.

Mawonekedwe opindika wamba

Kugaya kokhazikika — m'mphepete ting'onoting'ono, masewera otsika (misika ina yosinthira). Otsetsereka osaya, zotsika pang'ono.

Zomwe zimasokonekera - zolemba zazitali-zolemera. Kuthamanga kwakukulu; ROI yokhayo imasocheretsa popanda vuto.

Kugwa kwa Cliff — nthawi zambiri ziwonetsero zimachulukitsidwa pambuyo pochita masewera olimbitsa thupi (osakhala a Kelly) kapena kusintha kwa njira pakati pa zitsanzo.

Mabetcha omwe akudikirira

Mabetcha osakhazikika sayenera kuwonekera pamakona a equity - sanazindikire P/L. Kuphatikizirapo kumakulitsa kapena kuwononga mzere mopeka.

Bankroll vs profit curve

Chiwembu china cha ma chartkuyambira bankroll + cumulative profit; ena amakonza zongopeza phindu. Gwirizanitsani tchati ndi momwe mumagwiritsira ntchito ndalama m'maganizo. mybetrecord’s equity curve imagwiritsa ntchito phindu lokhazikika pakapita nthawi; bankroll mu ticker zikuphatikizapo wanu kukhazikitsidwa kuyambira bankroll plus anazindikira P/L.

Kugwiritsa ntchito mapindikidwe pozindikira

  1. Ikani zosintha pa nthawi (masewera atsopano, tipster yatsopano)
  2. Fananizani motsetsereka musanasinthe/litasintha
  3. Chiyembekezo chokulirakulirana - kodi kusiyanasiyana kumayendetsedwa ndi zikhomo kapena m'mphepete?

Lunzanitsa ndi ma metric ena

Mapiritsi a equity amakhala mwa kunyalanyaza ngati munyalanyaza CLV, zokolola, ndi kukula kwa zitsanzo. Gwiritsani ntchito poto kuti muzindikire; gwiritsani ntchito matebulo pazosankha.

Onani curve yanu ya equity mu malipoti a mybetrecord mutalowa mabets angapo okhazikika.

each-way-bet-settlement.title: Kufotokozera Kwa Bet Panjira Iliyonse
each-way-bet-settlement.description: Momwe kubetcherana kulikonse kumalipira pazopambana ndikuyika magawo. Zitsanzo zogwiritsidwa ntchito ndi tizigawo ta malo ndi malamulo a kutentha kwakufa.
each-way-bet-settlement.body:
Kubetchanjira iliyonse kubetcherana kuwiri m'modzi: theka lamtengo pa chisankho kuti apambane, theka poyikapo (malizitsani m'malo mwa mawu abuku). Masamu obweza ndalama amafika pamasamba ambiri.

Kapangidwe

Zigawo zonse S zogawanika:

  • Win part: S/2 at win odds
  • Ikani gawo: S/2 pamalo omwe simungagwirizane

Zovuta zamalo = 1 + (zopambana − 1) × gawo lamalo

Kagawo kakang'ono ka malo: 1/4 kapena 1/5 ya mwayi wopambana.

Chitsanzo — wopambana

£20 njira iliyonse (£10 kupambana + £10 malo) pa 10.00 kupambana odd, 1/4 malo mawu.

  • Chigawo cha Win chimalipira: 10 × £10 = £100 kubwerera (£90 phindu)
  • Zovuta zamalo: 1 + (10 − 1) × 0.25 = 3.25 → 3.25 × £10 = £32.50 kubwerera (£22.50 phindu)
  • Kupindula konse = £90 + £22.50 = £112.50

Chitsanzo - chongoikidwa

Kubetcha komweko, kavalo amathanso kachiwiri (malo omwe alipidwa, osapambana):

  • Win part yaluza: −£10
  • Ikani gawo lopambana: phindu la £22.50 monga pamwambapa
  • Kupindula kwakukulu = £ 12.50

Chitsanzo — chosayikidwa

Magawo onse awiri atayika: −£20 (mtengo wathunthu).

Kusinthana ndi zochitika zapadera

Kusinthana nthawi zambiri kumalekanitsa kupambana ndi misika yamalo — osati tikiti imodzi yokha. Kutentha kwakufa kumachepetsa kubwereranso kwa malo. Kuchotsera kwalamulo 4 kumakhudza magawo opambana pa mpikisano.

Nthawi zonse lembani each_way=true ndi place_fraction m'mabuku anu kuti mapulogalamu azigwiritsa ntchito njira yomweyi nthawi zonse.

Tsakani njira iliyonse mu mybetrecord

Sinthani njira iliyonse pa kubetcha, ikani kagawo kakang'ono ka malo, ndikuloleza kubweza phindu mukamalemba zotsatira zopambana/zoluza/zoyikapo.

odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.title: Mawonekedwe Odds - Decimal, American, and Fractional
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.description: Sinthani pakati pa decimal, American, ndi ma fractional odds. Tebulo lolozera ndi mafomula amitundu ya Hong Kong, Malaysian, ndi Indonesian.
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.body:
Osunga mabuku padziko lonse lapansi amawonetsa mitengo mosiyana. Buku lodziletsa limasunga chiwerengero chovomerezeka chimodzi mkati ndikukulolani kulowetsa mabetcha mumtundu uliwonse womwe mungawone pa skrini.

Decimal (European)

Chiwerengero chobweza pa mtengo uliwonse kuphatikiza sikeki. Decimal 2.50 → kupambana £1.50 phindu pa £1 pamtengo.

Phindu = stake × (decimal − 1)

American (ndalama)

Zabwino (+150): phindu pamtengo wa £100. +150 → decimal 2.50.

Choipa (−200): mtengo wofunikira kuti upambane £100. −200 → decimal 1.50.

Kutembenuka:

  • Ngati Amereka > 0: decimal = 1 + American/100
  • Ngati Amereka < 0: decimal = 1 + 100/|American|

Zochepa (UK)

6/4 amatanthauza kupambana £6 pamtengo uliwonse wa £4. Decimal = 1 + numerator/denominator = 2.50.

Mawebusayiti ena amawonetsa “6/4” monga gawo lopambana lokha; tsimikizirani nthawi zonse ngati chiwongola dzanja chikuphatikizidwa.

Mawonekedwe aku Asia

Mapangidwe Chitsanzo Decimal Hong Kong 0.85 1.85 Chimalaya + 0.85 1.85 Chimalesia − -0.85 1 + 1/0.85 ≈ 2.176 Chiindoneziya + 1.50 2.50 Chiindoneziya − −1.50 1 + 1/1.50 ≈ 1.667

Chifukwa chiyani kukhazikika kuli kofunika

Kusakaniza mafomu mu sipuredishiti imodzi kumabweretsa zolakwika mwakachetechete - Zizindikiro zaku America zochotsera, ziwerengero zocheperako, kapena kuchitira HK ngati decimal. Mapulogalamu ayenera kusinthidwa polowetsa ndipo osataya kulondola.

Langizo lothandiza

Khalani mtundu wolowera mu tracker yanu yofananira ndi bookmaker wanu wamkulu, koma tsimikizirani zofanana ndi desimali posunga mpaka chizolowezicho chitakhazikika.

mybetrecord imavomereza mitundu yonse yomwe yandandalikidwa ndikusunga ziwerengero za lipoti lililonse komanso mawerengedwe a Kelly.

closing-line-value-clv.title: Kutseka Mzere Wamtengo (CLV) - Chifukwa Chake Sharp Bettors Amayitsata
closing-line-value-clv.description: Mzere wotseka umayesa ngati mukupambana mtengo womaliza wamsika. Phunzirani momwe mungawerengere CLV ndi chifukwa chake imaneneratu luso la nthawi yayitali.
closing-line-value-clv.body:
Mzere wotseka (CLV) umafananiza zomwe mudachita motsutsana ndi zomwe zinalipo msika utatsekedwa (nthawi zambiri ikamayambika kapena kuthamanga). Kulimbana mosadukiza ndi chimodzi mwazinthu zolosera zamphamvu za phindu la nthawi yayitali - zamphamvu kuposa mwezi wamwayi’s P/L.

Chifukwa chiyani mzere wotseka uli wofunikira

Misika imaphatikiza zambiri. Mtengo wotsekera ukuwonetsa kuyerekeza komwe kulipo kwambiri chochitika chisanachitike. Ngati mumapeza 2.10 nthawi yotseka ndi 2.00, mukupeza phindu msika usanakonze.

Kuwerengera CLV

Tanthauzo lodziwika bwino:

CLV % = (zosawerengeka zanu ÷ kutseka kwa decimal − 1) × 100%

Chitsanzo: mumabetchera pa 2.20, kutseka kunali 2.00.

CLV = (2.20 ÷ 2.00 − 1) × 100 = +10%

Negative CLV zikutanthauza kuti mudachita zoyipa kuposa momwe munatsekera — ngakhale kubetcha kopambana kumatha kukhala kubetcha koyipa.

CLV vs zotsatira

Kusiyanasiyana kumabisa luso pa zitsanzo zazing'ono. Mutha kutaya ndalama ndi CLV yabwino kwa milungu ingapo, kapena kupambana ndi CLV yoyipa pa chotenthetsera. Tsatani CLV pa mabets mazana ambiri kuti muweruze ndondomeko.

Zomwe mungajambule

Pa kubetcha kulikonse, sungani:

  • Zovuta zomwe mwapeza (mtundu uliwonse)
  • Kutseka (msika womwewo, kusankha komweko)
  • Timestamp ngati mzere ukuyenda mkati mwa tsiku

Kutseka kwakusinthana kumasiyana ndi kutseka kwa mabuku ofewa — khalani osasinthasintha mkati mwazosunga zanu.

Zochepa

  • Kutseka sichowonadi chenicheni - kusuntha kwa nthunzi kungakhale kolakwikanso
  • Zotsatsa zotsatsa ndikukulitsa kufananitsa kosokoneza
  • Misika yaying'ono ili ndi phokoso lotseka

Gwiritsani ntchito CLV mu mybetrecord

Onjezani zotsekera pa kubetcha kapena kusintha. Malipoti amatha kuwonekera pafupifupi CLV pamodzi ndi ROI kotero kuti mulekanitse mwayi ndi m'mphepete.

kelly-criterion-explained.title: Kelly Criterion Yafotokozedwa kwa Obetcha
kelly-criterion-explained.description: Muyeso wa Kelly makulidwe amatengera malire ndi zovuta. Phunzirani fomula, Kelly wocheperako, ndi chitsanzo cha manambala chomwe mungatsimikizire.
kelly-criterion-explained.body:
Zotsatira za Kelly zimayankha funso limodzi: potengera malire anu, ndi gawo lanji la bankroll yomwe muyenera kuyika kuti muchulukitse kukula kwanthawi yayitali - osayika chiwopsezo chifukwa chochita zoyipa?

Njira (zosawerengeka zamadesimali)

Pakuti mupambane O ndi mwayi wopambana p:

Kelly fraction = (O × p − 1) / (O − 1)

Stake = Kelly fraction × bankroll (nthawi zambiri imachulukitsidwa ndi chitetezo).

Chitsanzo cha manambala

Mukukhulupirira kuti timu ili ndi mwayi 55% wopambana pa decimal odd 2.00 (ngakhale ndalama).

  • p = 0.55, O = 2.0
  • Kelly = (2.0 × 0.55 − 1) / (2.0 − 1) = 0.10 / 1.0 = 10% ya bankroll

Pa ndalama zokwana £1,000, Kelly wathunthu akupereka £100. Obetcha ambiri amagwiritsa theka Kelly (5%, £50) kapena kota Kelly kuti achepetse kusiyana.

Mphepete mwa kusagwirizana

Ngati “zabwino” mtengo ndi decimal 1.91 (kutanthauza 52.4%) ndipo mumalandira 2.00 (kutanthauza 50%), muli ndi malire abwino. Kelly amatembenuza malekezerowo kuti awonjezere omwe aperekedwa kuti akhale pamtengo.

Bwanji Kelly osadzaza nthawi zonse?

Full Kelly amakulitsa kukula kwa geometric mumalingaliro. Pochita:

  • Kuyerekeza kwanu kwa p ndikolakwika nthawi zambiri kuposa momwe mukuganizira
  • Kubetcha nthawi imodzi (ligi yomweyi, tsiku lomwelo)
  • Kusokoneza maganizo kumayambitsa kusiya dongosolo

Fractional Kelly (0.25–0.5×) ndi wokhazikika pakati pa akatswiri kubetcha.

Zolakwika wamba

  • Kugwiritsa ntchito Kelly pomwe mulibe malire enieni
  • Kuyika Kelly pamitu yolumikizana ngati zochitika paokha
  • Kunyalanyaza bankroll zomwe sizoona “ngozi yangozi”

Tsatani Kelly mu mybetrecord

Khazikitsani bankroll ndi Kelly kuchulukitsa mu zochunira. Lowetsani kuthekera kwanu pa kubetcha kulikonse kuti muwone mtengo wovomerezeka motsatizana ndi mtengo wanu weniweni - cheke chaukhondo, osati kulamula.

roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.title: ROI vs Zokolola mu Kubetcha Kwamasewera
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.description: ROI ndi zokolola zimayesa kubetcha mosiyanasiyana. Phunzirani mafomu, zitsanzo zogwiritsidwa ntchito, komanso nthawi yogwiritsira ntchito metric iliyonse.
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.body:
ROI (kubwezerani ndalama) ndi zokololazinambala ziwiri zamutu zomwe zimaperekedwa kwa ogulitsa kwambiri. Zimagwirizana koma sizisinthana - kugwiritsa ntchito zolakwika kungapangitse kuti nthawi yopuma ikhale ngati tsoka, kapena mosiyana.

Matanthauzo

ROI = phindu lonse ÷ ndalama zonse × 100%

Zopereka = phindu lonse ÷ chiwongola dzanja chonse × 100%

Kwa wobetchera yemwe sachulukitsa kukula kwake, chiwongola dzanja chimafanana ndi ma stake ndipo manambala amafanana. Magawo akasiyanasiyana - kukula kwa Kelly, kuphatikiza, kapena mayunitsi osakanikirana - amasiyana.

Chitsanzo chogwira ntchito

Tiyerekeze mabetcha opitilira 10 omwe mudapanga ndalama zokwana £100 nthawi iliyonse (£1,000 masiteki onse) ndikupanga phindu la £50.

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%
  • Zokolola = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%

Tsopano tiyerekeze kubetcherana kumodzi kunali £500 ndipo yotsalayo inali £50 (£950 yonse), phindu la £50 lomweli:

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 950 × 100 ≈ 5.3%
  • Zokolola zimalozeranso zakusintha momwemonso ngati turnover = stakes

Chisokonezochi nthawi zambiri chimawonekera pamene anthu akusakanizabankroll ROI (phindu ÷ kuyambira bankroll) ndi stake ROI. Nthawi zonse lembani dzina lomwe mukutanthauza.

Mukagwiritsa ntchito ROI

ROI pamtengo amayankha: “Pa paundi iliyonse yomwe ndidayika pachiwopsezo, ndi ndalama zingati zomwe zidabwerera?” Ndibwino kufananiza njira zofananira ndi magawo ofanana.

Mukagwiritsa ntchito zokolola

Zokolola pazachuma ndizofala kwambiri popereka malipoti amakampani ndi ma audits. Ikugogomezera kuchita bwino pa unit yomwe imabetchera mosasamala kanthu za kukula kwa bankroll.

Kunyanyala sikukwanira

Chiwongola dzanja cha 60% pazovuta zapakati pa 1.50 ndikutaya ndalama. Gwirizanitsani ROI/zokolola zokhala ndi mwayi wapakati ndi CLV kuti muwone ngati m'mphepete ndi weniweni kapena kusiyana.

Zotengera zenizeni

Sankhani metric imodzi yoyambira ndikuitsatira chaka ndi chaka. mybetrecord ikunena phindu ndi zotuluka pa kubetcha kokhazikika kotero kuti mutha kulumikizana ndi mulingo uliwonse womwe pulani yanu imagwiritsa ntchito.

what-is-a-betting-ledger.title: Kodi Ledger Yobetcha Ndi Chiyani?
what-is-a-betting-ledger.description: Kalata yobetcha ndi mbiri yolinganizidwa ya ndalama zonse zomwe mumabetcha. Dziwani chifukwa chake mabetcha olangidwa amasunga imodzi ndi zomwe muyenera kutsatira.
what-is-a-betting-ledger.body:
Buku lakubetcha ndi mbiri yathunthu, yotsatizana ndi mabetcha anu: zomwe mudathandizira, pazovuta zotani, kuchuluka kwake, ndi momwe zidakhazikika. Ganizirani izi ngati kusiyana pakati pa kulingalira ngati mwakonzekera nyengo ndi kudziwa.

Chifukwa chiyani masamba amalephera

Obetcha ambiri amayamba mu Excel kapena Google Mapepala. Izi zimagwira ntchito mpaka:

  • Ma formula amasweka mukawonjezera njira iliyonse kapena kusinthana magawo
  • Mumayiwala kulowetsa zopanda kanthu kapena kutulutsa ndalama
  • Simungathe kudula ndi tipster kapena masewera popanda kumanganso ma pivot table

Kalendala yodzipatulira imapangitsa kuti zinthu zikhale bwino, zimawerengera phindu pakusintha kulikonse, ndikusunga malipoti mosasintha.

Zomwe mungajambule

Osachepera, lowani:

  1. Zochitika ndi kusankha — zambiri zokwanira kuti muzindikire kubetcherana patapita miyezi ingapo
  2. Ndalama ndi ndalama
  3. Odds (mumtundu uliwonse womwe buku likuwonetsa)
  4. Zotsatira — zikuyembekezera, kupambana, kuluza, zopanda kanthu
  5. Phindu lokhazikika - kapena lolani mapulogalamu azipeza kuchokera ku malamulo otsatila

Magawo otsogola omwe amalekanitsa ma tracker akuthwa ndi ongolemba wamba:

  • Zolinga zaumwini (mtengo wanu wabwino)
  • Mizere yotseka (ya CLV)
  • Tipster kapena gwero lachitsanzo
  • Wosunga mabuku ndi ntchito

Ledger vs magazini

Anthu amagwiritsa ntchito “buku lobetcha” ndi “buku lobetcha” mosiyana. Kunena zoona, magazini ikhoza kukhala ndi zolemba zofotokozera (“ndinamva mothamanga”, “mzere wasuntha”); leja imatsindika manambala. Zida zabwino kwambiri zimaphatikiza zonse ziwiri: data yokhazikika kuphatikiza zolemba zaulere pa kubetcha kulikonse.

Ndani akufunika?

Aliyense amene amaona kubetcha ngati masewera aluso osati matikiti a lotale:

  • Ofananitsa mabetcha omwe akutsata oyenerera komanso kubetcha kwaulere
  • Amalonda osinthanitsa omwe amayesa zokolola zosinthidwa
  • Otsatira a Tipster akutsimikizira ROI yotsatsa
  • Otsatsa malonda omwe akufuna kasamalidwe ka ndalama mwachilungamo

Kuyamba

Sankhani masewera amodzi kapena mtundu wa msika ndikusunga mabetcha 20 otsatirawa osasintha ndondomeko yanu. Unikaninso kuchuluka kwa anthu omwe akunyanyalidwa, kuchuluka kwa mwayi, ndi phindu pa sabata. Chiyambi chimenecho ndichofunika kwambiri kuposa malangizo aliwonse.

Tsatirani izi mu mybetrecord: pangani akaunti yaulere, ikani bankroll yanu ndi mtundu wa odds osakhazikika, ndipo lowetsani kubetcha kwanu koyamba pasanathe mphindi imodzi.
